requirement_topic.en: Electrical safety baseline to MS IEC 60335-2-24 with ST evidence chain
requirement_topic.zh: MS IEC 60335-2-24电气安全基线与ST证据链
requirement_topic.zht: MS IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全基線與ST證據鏈

summary.en: Malaysia-aligned safety control for household refrigerators references the MS IEC 60335-2-24 series and is tied to ST destination compliance evidence through SIRIM and CoA-related handling. Key requirements cover electrical shock prevention, heat stress behavior, fire risk, and mechanical safety for normal household use.
summary.zh: 马来西亚对家用冰箱采用MS IEC 60335-2-24体系并结合ST与SIRIM的目的地合规证据链管理。核心要求覆盖触电防护、过热行为、起火风险及正常家用条件下机械安全。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞對家用冰箱採用MS IEC 60335-2-24體系並結合ST與SIRIM的目的地合規證據鏈管理。核心要求涵蓋觸電防護、過熱行為、起火風險及正常家用條件下機械安全。

standards_or_laws: MS IEC 60335-2-24 — Household refrigerating appliances — safety
Electrical Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) and ST CoA-linked safety evidence expectations

summary.en: China primarily uses GB 4706.13 for household refrigerator safety, supported by domestic test and inspection workflows. The Chinese baseline overlaps conceptually with IEC family tests, but does not replace the Malaysia destination safety evidence route.
summary.zh: 中国以GB 4706.13为主并结合国内检测与验收流程。中国基线在概念上与IEC系列测试有重叠，但不能替代马来西亚目的地的安全证据闭环和ST相关要求。
summary.zht: 中國以GB 4706.13為主並結合國內檢測與驗收流程。中國基線在概念上與IEC系列測試有重疊，但不能替代馬來西亞目的地的安全證據閉環和ST相關要求。

standards_or_laws: China CCC pathways where the model is in mandatory scope

gap.en: Chinese GB compliance can be a technical input, but Malaysia still needs destination safety mapping to MS IEC 60335-2-24 and regulator-facing evidence via ST and SIRIM. The practical gap appears when test reports are model-clustered in China and not mapped to Malaysia placement scope.
gap.zh: 中国GB合规可作为技术输入，但马来西亚仍需将证据映射到MS IEC 60335-2-24并通过ST/SIRIM的目的地流程。常见缺口在于中国测试报告按国内型号群分组，未按马来西亚机型入口范围映射。
gap.zht: 中國GB合規可作為技術輸入，但馬來西亞仍需將證據映射到MS IEC 60335-2-24並透過ST/SIRIM的目的地流程。常見缺口在於中國測試報告按國內機型群分組，未按馬來西亞機型入口範圍映射。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for Malaysia market placement of household refrigerators under ST-regulated electrical safety expectations and SIRIM-linked demonstration.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where CCC applies in China; mandatory in China does not imply Malaysia destination compliance completion.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese GB 4706.13 record should not be treated as a complete destination safety claim. Build Malaysia-facing evidence to MS IEC 60335-2-24 with ST/SIRIM-linked traceability and model-specific acceptance coverage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不能将中国GB 4706.13记录视为完整目的地安全声明。应构建与ST/SIRIM可追溯、机型覆盖明确的马来西亚导向MS IEC 60335-2-24证据链。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不能將中國GB 4706.13記錄視為完整目的地安全聲明。應構建與ST/SIRIM可追溯、機型覆蓋明確的馬來西亞導向MS IEC 60335-2-24證據鏈。
